Home Families Movements Use Cases
atlas v0.5
Back To Use Cases

Use Case

Product / Tool / Platform

适合 AI 工具、产品官网、平台型页面。应该先清楚状态、价值和界面行为，再谈气质。

Primary Family

Product Precision Interface

Structures

Workbench / Tool ShellCatalog Explorer

Why This Fit Works

从任务反推视觉和结构

Content Shape

Feature hierarchy, UI screenshots, clear task/value framing.

User Goal

让用户快速理解产品能做什么、如何使用、界面密度和可信度如何。

Why

先做状态、计划和操作区，再谈情绪化风格。

Avoid

  • 把复杂工具硬包成纯杂志页
  • 情绪压过任务说明
  • 截图不解释行为

Recommended Families

这个场景最适合借哪几条家族

Web Family

Product Precision Interface

Controlled, engineered, high-clarity product surfaces where state language, spacing, and UI logic outrank atmosphere.

Historical Roots

Bauhaus / Functional Modernism

Best For

AI toolstechnical productsplatform homepages
Open family
Web Family

Evidence-Dense Knowledge Surface

Thesis, evidence, navigation, and labels coexist. The page must remain trustworthy and scannable even when it gets dense.

Historical Roots

Bauhaus / Functional ModernismSwiss / International Typographic Style

Best For

research hubsdesign systemsguides
Open family

Prompt Packet

可以直接复制给 agent 的场景提示

Prompt Packet

Product / Tool / Platform

Content type: Product / Tool / Platform IA layer: Workbench / Tool Shell / Catalog Explorer Visual family: Product Precision Interface + Evidence-Dense Knowledge Surface Reference packet: Product Precision Interface / Evidence-Dense Knowledge Surface Mood: 适合 AI 工具、产品官网、平台型页面。应该先清楚状态、价值和界面行为，再谈气质。 Required traits: 让用户快速理解产品能做什么、如何使用、界面密度和可信度如何。 Avoid: 把复杂工具硬包成纯杂志页 / 情绪压过任务说明 / 截图不解释行为

Design Zondev is a design-style atlas: movement → family → structure → prompt packet.

Updated 2026-03-30 · design.zondev.top
